name: JueJin
description: ByteDances developer community (掘金) for tech articles, courses, AI tools and job listings.

seo.title: JueJin — Code Assistants / Agent Tooling
seo.meta_description: JueJin: ByteDances developer community (掘金) for tech articles, courses, AI tools and job listings.

when_to_use: Discovering Chinese developer articles and technical tutorials
Sharing technical content with China's developer community
Finding peer solutions to Chinese-language programming problems

pros: Quality Chinese tech content with editorial curation
Active community around frontend and mobile topics
Owned by ByteDance with strong traffic and growth
Useful job board for Chinese tech positions
cons: AI tool offerings are light compared to the core community
Mobile-first UX can feel cramped on desktop
Less depth than CSDN on legacy or enterprise topics
review.verdict: A high-signal Chinese dev community, especially for frontend; irrelevant for anyone who cannot read Chinese.
review.best_for: Chinese-speaking frontend and mobile developers seeking quality articles and jobs
review.not_for: Global developers or those looking for an AI coding assistant specifically
